Off Calendar May-13-2003 Denied

Mark P. Krinsky, Esq., 217-0060, for defendant San Francisco Gravel Co. moving for 90-day stay of all proceedings against defendant related to 98485
John B. Goldstein, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL 898-1555, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
